name: Flood Emergency Response Protocol

steps.action: Evacuate all personnel from basement and ground floor areas immediately
Shut off electrical mains in flooded zones
constraints: Do not enter flooded electrical rooms — isolate remotely if possible

steps.action: Move critical assets and documents to upper floors
constraints: Prioritize server equipment and irreplaceable records

steps.action: Set up medical triage point on second floor for those with water exposure injuries

constraints: Do not enter flooded zones without waterproof protective equipment
